scripts.test: node tests/test_cli_commands.js && node tests/test_health_scoring.js && node tests/test_evidence_pack.js && node tests/test_required_surfaces.js && node tests/test_context_graph.js && node tests/test_review_gate.js && node tests/test_mistake_shield.js && node tests/test_phase0.js && node tests/test_codex_review.js && node tests/test_source_protection.js && npm --prefix apps/dashboard test
scripts.dashboard: npm --prefix apps/dashboard install && npm --prefix apps/dashboard run dev -- --open
scripts.demo:codex: node cli/index.js codex-review --target examples/governed-saas-after --model gpt-5.6-sol --live-report apps/dashboard/public/live-report.json
scripts.dashboard:build: npm --prefix apps/dashboard install && npm --prefix apps/dashboard run build
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run demo && npm run dashboard:build
